en: In those days, when again a great crowd had gathered, and they had nothing to eat, he called his disciples to him and said to them,
zh: 那些日子，又有一大群人聚集，他們沒有甚麼東西吃。耶穌叫門徒來，對他們說：

en: "I have compassion on the crowd, because they have been with me now three days and have nothing to eat.
zh: “我憐憫這一群人，因為他們和我在一起已經有三天，沒有甚麼吃的了。

en: And if I send them away hungry to their homes, they will faint on the way. And some of them have come from far away."
zh: 如果我叫他們散開，餓著肚子回家去，他們會在路上暈倒，因為有人是從很遠的地方來的。”

en: And his disciples answered him, "How can one feed these people with bread here in this desolate place?"
zh: 門徒回答：“在這曠野地方，從哪裡能找食物叫這些人吃飽呢？”

en: And he asked them, "How many loaves do you have?" They said, "Seven."
zh: 他問他們：“你們有多少餅？”他們說：“七個。”

en: And he directed the crowd to sit down on the ground. And he took the seven loaves, and having given thanks, he broke them and gave them to his disciples to set before the people; and they set them before the crowd.
zh: 耶穌吩咐群眾坐在地上；拿起那七個餅，祝謝了，擘開遞給門徒，叫他們擺開；門徒就擺在眾人面前，

en: And they had a few small fish. And having blessed them, he said that these also should be set before them.
zh: 他們還有幾條小魚，耶穌祝了福，就吩咐把這些也擺開。

en: And they ate and were satisfied. And they took up the broken pieces left over, seven baskets full.
zh: 眾人都吃了，並吃飽了。他們把剩下的零碎收拾起來，裝滿了七個大籃子。

en: And there were about four thousand people. And he sent them away.
zh: 當時人數約有四千。耶穌解散了群眾，

en: And immediately he got into the boat with his disciples and went to the district of Dalmanutha.
zh: 就立刻和門徒上了船，來到大瑪努他地區。

en: The Pharisees came and began to argue with him, seeking from him a sign from heaven to test him.
zh: 法利賽人出來，跟耶穌辯論；他們想試探他，求他顯個從天上來的神蹟。

en: And he sighed deeply in his spirit and said, "Why does this generation seek a sign? Truly, I say to you, no sign will be given to this generation."
zh: 耶穌靈裡深深地歎息，說：“這世代為甚麼總是尋求神蹟？我實在告訴你們，決不會有神蹟顯給這個世代的！”

en: And he left them, got into the boat again, and went to the other side.
zh: 於是他離開他們，又上船往對岸去了。

en: Now they had forgotten to bring bread, and they had only one loaf with them in the boat.
zh: 門徒忘了帶餅，船上除了一個餅，身邊沒有別的了。

en: And he cautioned them, saying, "Watch out; beware of the leaven of the Pharisees and the leaven of Herod."
zh: 耶穌囑咐他們說：“你們要小心，提防法利賽人的酵和希律的酵！”

en: And they began discussing with one another the fact that they had no bread.
zh: 門徒彼此議論說：“這是因為我們沒有餅吧？”

en: And Jesus, aware of this, said to them, "Why are you discussing the fact that you have no bread? Do you not yet perceive or understand? Are your hearts hardened?
zh: 耶穌知道了，就說：“為甚麼議論沒有餅這件事呢？你們還不知道，還不明白嗎？你們的心還是這麼遲鈍嗎？

en: Having eyes do you not see, and having ears do you not hear? And do you not remember?
zh: 你們有眼不能看，有耳不能聽嗎？你們不記得嗎？

en: When I broke the five loaves for the five thousand, how many baskets full of broken pieces did you take up?" They said to him, "Twelve."
zh: 我擘開那五個餅給五千人吃，你們收拾的零碎裝滿了幾個籃子呢？”他們說：“十二個。”

en: "And the seven for the four thousand, how many baskets full of broken pieces did you take up?" And they said to him, "Seven."
zh: “那七個餅分給四千人吃，你們收拾的零碎裝滿了幾個大籃子呢？”他們說：“七個。”

en: And he said to them, "Do you not yet understand?"
zh: 耶穌說：“你們還不明白嗎？”

en: And they came to Bethsaida. And some people brought to him a blind man and begged him to touch him.
zh: 後來他們到了伯賽大，有人帶了一個瞎眼的人到他跟前，求耶穌摸他。

en: And he took the blind man by the hand and led him out of the village, and when he had spit on his eyes and laid his hands on him, he asked him, "Do you see anything?"
zh: 耶穌拉著他的手，領他到村外，吐唾沫在他的眼睛上，又用雙手按在他的身上，問他：“你看見甚麼沒有？”

en: And he looked up and said, "I see men, but they look like trees, walking."
zh: 他往上一看，說：“我看見人了！看見他們好像樹走來走去。”

en: Then Jesus laid his hands on his eyes again; and he opened his eyes, his sight was restored, and he saw everything clearly.
zh: 於是耶穌再按手在他的眼睛上，他定睛一看，就復原了，樣樣都看得清楚了。

en: And he sent him to his home, saying, "Do not even enter the village."
zh: 耶穌叫他回家去，說：“連這村子你也不要進去。”

en: And Jesus went on with his disciples to the villages of Caesarea Philippi. And on the way he asked his disciples, "Who do people say that I am?"
zh: 耶穌和門徒出去，要到該撒利亞．腓立比附近的村莊。在路上他問門徒說：“人說我是誰？”

en: And they told him, "John the Baptist; and others say, Elijah; and others, one of the prophets."
zh: 他們回答：“有人說是施洗的約翰；有人說是以利亞；還有人說是先知裡的一位。”

en: And he asked them, "But who do you say that I am?" Peter answered him, "You are the Christ."
zh: 他又問他們說：“那麼你們呢？你們說我是誰？”彼得回答：“你就是基督。”

en: And he strictly charged them to tell no one about him.
zh: 耶穌鄭重地囑咐他們，不要把他的事告訴人。

en: And he began to teach them that the Son of Man must suffer many things and be rejected by the elders and the chief priests and the scribes and be killed, and after three days rise again.
zh: 於是他教導他們，人子必須受許多苦，被長老、祭司長和經學家棄絕、殺害，三天後復活。

en: And he said this plainly. And Peter took him aside and began to rebuke him.
zh: 耶穌坦白地說了這話，彼得就把他拉到一邊，責怪他。

en: But turning and seeing his disciples, he rebuked Peter and said, "Get behind me, Satan! For you are not setting your mind on the things of God, but on the things of man."
zh: 耶穌轉過身來，望著門徒，斥責彼得說：“撒但，退到我後面去！因為你不思念 神的事，只思念人的事。”

en: And he called to him the crowd with his disciples and said to them, "If anyone would come after me, let him deny himself and take up his cross and follow me.
zh: 於是把眾人和門徒都叫過來，對他們說：“如果有人願意跟從我，就應當捨己，背起他的十字架來跟從我。

en: For whoever would save his life will lose it, but whoever loses his life for my sake and the gospel's will save it.
zh: 凡是想救自己生命的，必喪掉生命；但為我和福音犧牲生命的，必救了生命。

en: For what does it profit a man to gain the whole world and forfeit his life?
zh: 人就是賺得全世界，卻賠上自己的生命，有甚麼好處呢？

en: For what can a man give in return for his life?
zh: 人還能用甚麼換回自己的生命呢？

en: For whoever is ashamed of me and of my words in this adulterous and sinful generation, of him will the Son of Man also be ashamed when he comes in the glory of his Father with the holy angels."
zh: 在淫亂罪惡的世代，凡把我和我的道當作可恥的，人子在他父的榮耀裡，和聖天使一起降臨的時候，也必把他當作可恥的。”
